gameTitle: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets

achievements.title: Helping the Less Fortunate
achievements.description: Assist the ghoul that lives in the Weasleys' attic.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Best Mate
achievements.description: Ron Weasley joins the group for the first time in Diagon Alley.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Amphibian Wrangler
achievements.description: Capture all 5 purple toads without leaving the Magical Menagerie or quitting the game.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: The First Obstacle
achievements.description: Defeat the Footman blocking your path in the Gringotts Dungeon.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Damaging School Property
achievements.description: Incapacitate the Whomping Willow so you can escape.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Castle Secrets
achievements.description: Discover your first secret passageway in Hogwarts Castle.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: A Considerate Teammate
achievements.description: Return the Magic Storybook to Katie Bell to learn a new spell.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: The Final Exchange
achievements.description: Trade Professor Binns for a Dragon Skin Cloak.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Herbology 201
achievements.description: Return all three mandrakes to Madame Sprout and learn Incendio.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Better Out Than In
achievements.description: Help Hagrid to make some treacle fudge in order to ease Ron's suffering.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Dueling Champion
achievements.description: Defeat the seventh-year student to earn the Dueling Trophy.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Enemies of the Heir, Beware
achievements.description: Discover a mysterious message next to a petrified Mrs. Norris.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Handling Ghosts
achievements.description: Learn about the Skurge spell from a Kwikspell book.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Comforting the Dead
achievements.description: Cheer Murtle up with a gift and receive another in return.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: The Price of Victory
achievements.description: Win the first Quidditch match of the season despite the rogue bludger.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Earning Some Respect
achievements.description: Defeat Malfoy at the Dueling Club and receive your reward.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: The Last Ingredient
achievements.description: Defeat Crabbe and Goyle in a duel so you can gather some bits.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Visiting the Past
achievements.description: Discover who opened the Chamber of Secrets 50 years ago.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Follow the Spiders
achievements.description: Defeat Aragog inside the Forbidden Forest.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Assaulting a Teacher
achievements.description: Force Professor Lockhart to help you save Ginny.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Serpent Slayer
achievements.description: Defeat the monster hidden within the Chamber of Secrets.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Vermillious 2.0
achievements.description: Harry or Hermione levels up Vermillious, learning Vermillious Duo.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Vermillious Mastery
achievements.description: Harry levels up Vermillious again, learning Vermillious Tria. (Do not open Transfiguration card chest)
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Verdimillious 2.0
achievements.description: Harry or Hermione levels up Verdimillious, learning Verdimillious Duo.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Verdimillious Mastery
achievements.description: Harry levels up Verdimillious again, learning Verdimillious Tria. (Do not open Music card chest)
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Flipendo 2.0
achievements.description: Harry or Ron levels up Flipendo, learning Flipendo Duo.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Flipendo Mastery
achievements.description: Ron levels up Flipendo again, learning Flipendo Tria.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Incendio 2.0
achievements.description: Harry or Ron levels up Incendio, learning Incendio Duo.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Incendio Mastery
achievements.description: Harry levels up Incendio again, learning Incendio Tria. (Do not open Hogwarts card chest)
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Mucas Adnauseum 2.0
achievements.description: Harry or Ron levels up Mucas Adnauseum, learning Mucas Adnauseum Duo.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Mucus Adnauseum Mastery
achievements.description: Harry levels up Mucas Adnauseum again, learning Mucas Adnauseum Tria. (Do not open Curses card chest)
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Petrificus Totalus 2.0
achievements.description: Hermione or Ron levels up Petrificus Totalus, learning Petrificus Totalus Duo.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Petrificus Totalus Mastery
achievements.description: Hermione levels up Petrificus Totalus again, learning Petrificus Totalus Tria.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Fumos 2.0
achievements.description: Hermione levels up Fumos, learning Fumos Duo.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Complimentary Potions
achievements.description: Complete your collection of Alchemy cards and open the corresponding chest in the Card Collectors' Club.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Charming
achievements.description: Complete your collection of Charms cards and open the corresponding chest in the Card Collectors' Club.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Admirer of the Dark Arts
achievements.description: Complete your collection of Curses cards and open the corresponding chest in the Card Collectors' Club.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: The Ultimate Defense
achievements.description: Complete your collection of Protection cards and open the corresponding chest in the Card Collectors' Club.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Seasoned Soothsayer
achievements.description: Complete your collection of Divination cards and open the corresponding chest in the Card Collectors' Club.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Collector of the Eclectic
achievements.description: Complete your collection of Generalist cards and open the corresponding chest in the Card Collectors' Club.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Apprentice Healer
achievements.description: Complete your collection of Healing cards and open the corresponding chest in the Card Collectors' Club.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: School Spirit
achievements.description: Complete your collection of Hogwarts cards and open the corresponding chest in the Card Collectors' Club.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Music Appreciation
achievements.description: Complete your collection of Musician cards and open the corresponding chest in the Card Collectors' Club.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Quidditch Fan
achievements.description: Complete your collection of Quidditch cards and open the corresponding chest in the Card Collectors' Club.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: The Art of Transformation
achievements.description: Complete your collection of Transfiguration cards and open the corresponding chest in the Card Collectors' Club.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Combo Completionist
achievements.description: Record all 40 card attack combos in your Folio Triplicus.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Common Creatures
achievements.description: Use Informous on all 15 non-magical animals (excepting rats and spiders) listed in the Folio Bruti.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Beasts in Your Backyard
achievements.description: Use Informous on all 6 garden-dwelling beasts listed in the Folio Bruti.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Magical Mechanisms
achievements.description: Use Informous on all 8 enchanted muggle artifacts listed in the Folio Bruti.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Vexing Vermin
achievements.description: Use Informous on all 6 corporeal rats listed in the Folio Bruti.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Horrible Humanoids
achievements.description: Use Informous on at least 6 of the 8 violent beasts possessing the human shape listed in the Folio Bruti.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Raging Reptiles
achievements.description: Use Informous on at least 4 of the 5 types of firecrabs and salamanders listed in the Folio Bruti.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Fantastic Flora
achievements.description: Use Informous on all 6 plantlike beasts listed in the Folio Bruti.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Possessed Platemail
achievements.description: Use Informous on all 8 types of armor listed in the Folio Bruti.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Shocking Spectres
achievements.description: Use Informous on all 7 spiritual entities listed in the Folio Bruti.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Alarming Arachnids
achievements.description: Use Informous on all 8 types of spiders listed in the Folio Bruti.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Accomplished Gardener
achievements.description: Clear out at least 15 gnomes in De-Gnome The Garden on any difficulty.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Contender
achievements.description: Clear out at least as many gnomes as Ron in De-Gnome The Garden on Difficult.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Clearing the Fence
achievements.description: Toss a gnome past the garden fence in Gnome Throwing on Difficult.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Inhuman Strength
achievements.description: Get a distance greater than 1600 in Gnome Throwing on any difficulty.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Coin Collector
achievements.description: Collect at least 28 coins in The Flying Anglia on Easy.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Licensed Motorist
achievements.description: Score at least 4200 in The Flying Anglia on any difficulty.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Peskipiksi Pesternomi
achievements.description: Score at least 2400 points in Pixies on any difficulty.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Devilish Tricky Little Blighters
achievements.description: Capture at least 24 pixies individually in Pixies on Difficult.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: 150 Points!
achievements.description: Capture the Snitch before the opposing seeker in Quidditch on Difficult.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Professional Seeker
achievements.description: Capture the Snitch in less than 5 seconds in Quidditch on any difficulty.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: On a Roll
achievements.description: Bowl a strike after having achieved a spare or strike in the previous frame.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Respectable Bowler
achievements.description: Score at least 150 in Ghost Head Bowling on Difficult.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: The Swish and Flick
achievements.description: Get a score of at least 1100 in Flitwick Says 2-Flitwick Boogaloo on Difficult.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Wingardium Leviosa Mastery
achievements.description: Get a perfect score of 850 in Flitwick Says 2-Flitwick Boogaloo on Medium.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Beware Falling Objects
achievements.description: Score at least 7777 points in Transfiguration Challenge on Difficult.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Avifors Mastery
achievements.description: Transfigure 100 items into birds in Transfiguration Challenge on Medium.
achievements.author: Prism
